summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Escape Room app based on 'La Historia Interminable'. All core functionality working perfectly including floating names, group sorting, and animations.

design_issues.issue: Both Los Silfos Nocturnos and Los Fuegos Fatuos use orange colors (text-orange-500 and text-orange-400) instead of having more distinct color separation

passed_tests: All 20 student names appear floating initially
4 groups appear in correct corners with proper titles
Auryn click triggers smooth sorting animation
Los Comerrocas contains correct members: Pablo A, Olivia, Carlos, Luz
Los Silfos Nocturnos contains correct members: Jorge, Agustín, David, Valeria, Miriam
Los Fuegos Fatuos contains correct members: Salva, Zoe, Adriana, Raúl, Marcos
Los Diminutenses contains correct members: Elena, Lucía, Alonso, Ángel, Pablo M
Dary appears with 'Ayudante de Jose' message after sorting
Smooth animations and magical effects working
No JavaScript errors or console warnings
